---
title: "Primitive"
description: "A LocalDate in the range [0001-01-01, 9999-12-31] ([Date.MIN, Date.MAX]). This is the range that can be stored as primitive Dates on a ledger, and matches the set of representable dates in the [RFC-3339](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt) date-time format. Any LocalDate in that range can be converted to a Date by calling Date.fromLocalDate."
---
